key_themes: Sharp recovery from 2025 all-time low (+288% from Oct 2025 bottom)
Modest YTD market cap growth (~$31M to ~$44M)
Extremely low liquidity and trading volume (~$300–$400 daily)
Stagnant DeFi credit/lending protocol with minimal recent development news
Highly speculative micro-cap with bearish longer-term price forecasts
summary: RCN (Ripio Credit Network / RCN Finance) shows short-term positive price action in 2026, recovering strongly from its October 2025 all-time low and posting small daily gains of ~1.8–2.5% with market cap rising from around $31 million to $44 million. However, it remains an extremely illiquid micro-cap crypto with daily volume often below $400, 24k holders, and almost no meaningful recent news, updates, or organic investor discussion. While a few voices express hope it could reclaim past highs, algorithmic forecasts are bearish and the project (a 2017-era Ethereum-based credit/lending protocol) appears largely dormant.[[1]](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/ripio-credit-network/)[[1]](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/ripio-credit-network/)
sources: 10+ price/chart pages (CoinMarketCap, CoinGecko, Yahoo Finance RCN-USD, Coinbase, TradingView, CoinCodex), X/Twitter: limited relevant organic discussion (under 5 high-quality posts found amid spam/unrelated results), News & analysis: CoinCodex predictions, Forbes tangential coverage, crypto.news snippet on MC growth
